front: Composer: Italian-American film composer; wrote 'Moon River' for Audrey Hepburn in Breakfast at Tiffany's and the 'Pink Panther Theme'
Composer: piano arrangement of Nino Rota's Romeo and Juliet love theme (1968) knocked the Beatles' 'Get Back' from the #1 spot on Billboard

Song: written for Audrey Hepburn in Breakfast at Tiffany's; Johnny Mercer lyrics ('huckleberry friend,' 'wider than a mile'); in 3/4 time, opens with 'long C, short high G, F, E, eighth D-C-B-flat, long C'
Song: Truman Capote's original novella ending (Holly escaping to Brazil) was replaced by a film ending using this song
Theme: bass chromatically ascends from C-sharp to a long E in swung eighth notes, setting up the saxophone melody
Song: lyrics consist of two run-on sentences inspired by an Ernest Dowson poem
